Adams of the Law Office of Julia M. Adams (658.5848) for defendant and responding party. Argued and the court ruled as follows: motion to compel discovery responses granted. Defendant must file new responses without objections or file motion for relief from waiver by March 17, 2011. Motion to deem matters admitted denied. The court took the issue of sanctions under submission. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
